content: penSearch to call a Bedrock model to generate embeddings as part of the ingestion or search process. III. Agentic AI Concept Key Details and AWS Services Bedrock Agents Agents leverage FMs with tools, planning capabilities, and memory. The Planning Module guides the LLM to break down complex requests into sub- questions. Action Groups define the tools an agent can use, relying on an OpenAPI (Swagger) schema uploaded to S3 to standardize function definitions, input parameters, and outputs, improving tool reliability. Agent Workflows Complex tasks may utilize Multi-agent workflows, where an Orchestrator delegates subtasks to worker LLMs, and a Synthesizer combines results. Tasks can be structured as Chain of Sequence (sequential processing where output feeds the next step) or use Parallelization for concurrent execution (e.g., running multiple guardrails or using voting across multiple model responses).
